description.zh-Hans: 分析输入图像并提取统计属性：平均亮度、对比度、熵、边缘密度、主色调。通过IMultiOutputNode输出多个浮点端口。
description.en: Analyzes an input image and extracts statistical properties: average luminance, contrast, entropy, edge density, dominant hue. Outputs multiple float ports via IMultiOutputNode.

triggers.zh-Hans: 图像分析, 图片分析, 亮度分析, 对比度分析, 熵分析, 边缘检测, 色调分析
triggers.en: image analysis, picture analysis, luminance, contrast, entropy, edge detection, hue

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 分析输入图像提取平均亮度和对比度统计数据，用于条件分支判断。
exampleUsage.en: Analyze an input image to extract average luminance and contrast statistics for conditional branching.
